reviews.review_description: The slide positions are weird and your holding the trombone wrong

developer_response.body:
Thanks for taking the time to share your feedback. I appreciate you pointing out the issues with the slide positions and trombone grip - these details matter for a realistic experience. While I can't implement these fixes immediately, your input helps me understand what needs improvement for future updates.

Since the app didn't meet your expectations, I'd encourage you to request a refund through Meta's store - they have a straightforward refund process for purchases that don't work out.
-- Michael
